subject: الرياضيات
notes: MOE file ID 3407 actually contains BOTH Math G7 Sem 2 Part 1 AND Part 2 concatenated into a single 224-page PDF. PDF pages 1-130 = Sem 2 Part 1 (cover says '1/2', contains Units 5-6: Fractions and Geometry). PDF pages 131-224 = Sem 2 Part 2 (cover says '2/2', contains Units 7-8: Percentages and Probability). Earlier claim that Math G7 Sem 2 Part 1 was unavailable from MOE is WRONG — it's included in this same file. Grade 7 Semester 2 total is 8 units across 2 parts, but the 'الجزء الأول/الثاني' on page 12/contents refers to Semester 1 vs Semester 2 (not to Part 1/Part 2 of Sem 2).
